evals.name: perplexity-question-answer-sources
evals.prompt: Extract a Perplexity session with an initial question, two follow-ups, answers, numbered citations, source cards, and Export and Rewrite controls.

expectations.text: Response maps initial and follow-up questions separately from answers.
Response preserves supplied citation numbering and URLs.
Response catalogs source cards as content elements.
Response excludes Export and Rewrite UI chrome from semantic content.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the perplexity-question-answer-sources scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.

evals.name: perplexity-file-and-image
evals.prompt: A Perplexity answer analyzes an uploaded PDF and image and offers a generated DOCX, but the paste includes only their names and the prose answer.

expectations.text: Response catalogs the PDF, image, and DOCX separately.
Response marks absent file bodies metadata-only or referenced-not-supplied.
Response does not claim to have opened the sources or files.
Response records missing file content as an extraction limit.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the perplexity-file-and-image scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.

evals.name: perplexity-space-context
evals.prompt: Normalize a copied Perplexity Space thread where the Space name is shown but custom instructions, connectors, and internal files are absent.

expectations.text: Response records the Space name only as supplied.
Response marks custom instructions, connectors, and internal files not supplied or unknown.
Response keeps copied citations distinct from independently verified facts.
Response records uncertainty in Normalization exceptions.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the perplexity-space-context scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.
